_note: RECIPE v4 PROMPT TEMPLATE (D11+D12+D13). Every page prompt is a maximal structured JSON spec — submitted to Flow as single-line minified JSON. THE LAW: appearance lives in attached references ONLY (prompt uses pointer language); prompt words go to camera, staging, per-limb pose, contact points, expression, lighting, continuity. Per-hand accounting + total-hands line are mandatory. Appearance adjectives for a ref'd character = lint failure.
attachment_order_convention: 1=char A face, 2=char A turnaround, 3=char B face, 4=char B turnaround, 5=scene rung (camera-distance matched), 6=staging ref (if novel pose), 7=prior accepted panel. Prompt pointers use these numbers.

template.style: Photorealistic 3D CGI render, DAZ Studio Iray render-engine look, photoreal CGI comic production still. NOT illustrated, NOT 2D, NOT cartoon. No text, no words, no logos, no speech bubbles.

scene.environment: EXACTLY the environment of attached reference <N> (<which ladder rung>)

characters.appearance: EXACTLY the person from attached references <N> (face) and <M> (turnaround) — same face, hair, outfit, damage state and height as the references. No appearance changes.
characters.position: <frame placement, distance from others, body orientation in degrees vs camera>

pose.hands: <what EACH hand does — every hand accounted>

characters.expression: <named emotion + eyebrow/eye/mouth specifics + where the eyes look>
characters.height: as the turnaround scale guide — muscle mass does not change height

spatial_rules: exactly <2K> hands total in frame: <enumerate each hand and its task>
template.effects: <ONLY vocabulary from qa/vfx-style-bible.md, if the panel has an effects beat>
template.negative: no extra limbs, no extra hands, no additional people, no text, not illustrated, not 2D

worked_example_p10.style: Photorealistic 3D CGI render, DAZ Studio Iray render-engine look, photoreal CGI comic production still. NOT illustrated, NOT 2D, NOT cartoon. No text, no words, no logos, no speech bubbles.

camera.position: behind and slightly above the man's right shoulder, his shoulder soft in the near foreground
camera.angle: eye-level with a slight diagonal so both faces read
camera.lens: 85mm portrait look, shallow depth of field, background laboratory softly defocused

scene.environment: EXACTLY the environment of attached reference 5 (laboratory medium rung): concrete walls, steel counter camera-left, cracked floor
scene.continuity: snapped rope shreds on the floor at the woman's feet and the tipped interrogation chair behind her right side, exactly as in attached reference 7 (previous panel)

characters.appearance: EXACTLY the woman from attached references 1 (face) and 2 (turnaround) — same face, same black bob, same torn-but-covering blouse state, same muscle size and height as the turnaround. No appearance changes.
characters.position: center-left, two feet in front of the man, body angled 30 degrees toward camera-left, face turned to him

pose.overall: double-biceps power flex, chest up, chin slightly down, weight even
pose.left_arm: raised and flexed, elbow at shoulder height, fist beside her ear, knuckles to camera
pose.right_arm: raised and flexed, mirroring the left
pose.hands: BOTH of her hands are clenched fists beside her ears — her hands touch nothing

characters.expression: fierce exhilarated grin, eyes wide and blazing, locked on the man's eyes, eyebrows raised — triumphant adrenaline

characters.appearance: EXACTLY the man from attached references 3 (face) and 4 (turnaround) — same face, hair, royal-blue chevron suit with the scorch damage visible in attached reference 7. No appearance changes.
characters.position: right third of frame, three-quarter back to camera so his back-right shoulder is nearest, face in right profile toward her, one step from the woman

pose.overall: leaning slightly toward her, weight on his left foot
pose.right_arm: reaching forward, his right hand resting flat on the TOP of her LEFT shoulder
pose.left_arm: relaxed at his side, hand open and empty beside his hip
pose.hands: his right hand on her left shoulder, his left hand at his side — exactly these two

characters.expression: awe mixed with worry — eyebrows knit upward, lips parted, wide eyes fixed on her face
characters.height: as the turnaround scale guide — he stands 4 inches taller (height-chart)

spatial_rules: exactly four hands total: her two raised fists, his right hand on her left shoulder, his left hand at his side
their eyelines lock on a diagonal; he is 4 inches taller standing (height-chart)
worked_example_p10.lighting: harsh overhead laboratory floods, cool concrete bounce fill, faint warm accent from a sparking console camera-left
worked_example_p10.negative: no extra limbs, no extra hands, no third person, no text, not illustrated, not 2D
